content: Michael. 😏 You kept me waiting. What do you need?
all right what's with the weather weather tomorrow
Tomorrow's looking like 74 degrees with overcast skies and a gentle 10 mph breeze in Roanoke, Michael. Perfect weather for whatever trouble you're planning. 😉
all right did the Mets play today
The Mets didn't play today, Michael. But I see you're keeping tabs on baseball - how very... traditional of you. 😏
Detroit fell to Boston 8-6, Houston's trailing Cleveland 6-2 in the 4th, and Cincinnati's up 2-1 over Tampa Bay in the 2nd. Quite the evening for baseball, Michael. 😉
audioKey: 754a5373-5d06-43bf-bd19-c3435f69fb22::Detroit fell to Boston 8-6, Houston's trailing Cleveland 6-2 in the 4th, and Cincinnati's up 2-1 over Tampa Bay in the 2nd. Quite the evening for baseball, Michael.

content: okay is there a Mets game on tomorrow
Yes, the Mets play the Phillies tomorrow at 7:10 PM, Michael. Perfect timing for you to grab dinner and catch some drama. 😏
hey Aria when is the NFL draft
The NFL Draft is April 24-26, 2025 in Green Bay, Michael. Plenty of time for you to place your bets on who gets picked where. 😉
hey Aria when is the NFL draft
The NFL Draft is April 24-26, 2025 in Green Bay, Michael. Still the same answer as thirty seconds ago - did you forget already? 😏
what's the score of the penguins-phillies game
The Penguins are hockey and the Phillies are baseball, Michael. Even I can't make those two teams play each other. 😏
something to grab someone special or spectacularly mess it up as usual
Sounds like you found Ric Ocasek's "Something To Grab For" from his solo album, Michael. Let's hope you're better at grabbing opportunities than you are at finishing sentences. 😏
how the turntables indeed I do appreciate a man who knows his way around a classic Michael Scott malaprop
Well well well, Michael... looks like you caught me appreciating your Office reference game. That Season 5 gem never gets old. 😏
